name: aiosendspin
onCreateCommand: sudo mkdir -p /home/vscode/.claude/downloads && (sudo chown -R $(id -u):$(id -g) /home/vscode/.claude 2>/dev/null || true) && (sudo chown -R $(id -u):$(id -g) "${containerWorkspaceFolder}" 2>/dev/null || true)
postCreateCommand: git config --global --add safe.directory ${containerWorkspaceFolder} && ./scripts/setup.sh && curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash
